metadata.title: Raising An Agent - Episode 9
metadata.description:
In this episode, Quinn and Thorsten discuss how everything seems to have changed again with Gemini 3 and Opus 4.5 and what comes after — the assistant is dead, long live the factory.

01:00 Introduction and Recap of Changes
01:51 The Impact of Gemini 3 and Opus 4-5
05:28 Shifting Perceptions of AI Agents
10:17 Adapting Codebases for AI Efficiency
14:48 The Future of Software Development with AI Agents
19:29 Challenges and Opportunities Ahead
24:00 The Importance of Frontier Models
25:12 Adapting to AI-Driven Workflows
26:57 The Future of Coding Agents
28:07 Building an Agentic Code Base
30:22 Rethinking Development Tools
31:44 Amp's Evolution and Team Dynamics
33:00 Q&A: Model Selection and Subscriptions
39:18 Teasing New Features: Deep
